name: RagSphere Knowledge Agent
description: A hybrid RAG agent that ingests PDFs, Excels, and YouTube videos, and answers questions by combining vector search, knowledge graphs, and live web data.

skills.name: Document Ingestion
skills.description: Ingests a document from a public URL (PDF, Excel) or a YouTube link for indexing.

source_url.description: The URL of the document or YouTube video.

skills.name: Knowledge Retrieval
skills.description: Asks a question against an ingested document or video using hybrid RAG.

document_id.description: The ID of the document (returned from ingest).

use_web_search.description: Whether to use live web search for the answer.
